calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Final Distribution
Off Calendar Jul-11-2022 Granted Per Written Order

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Final Distribution
Off Calendar May-11-2022 Continued To Jul-11-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Danielle Dillard, via Zoom, in propria persona, Administrator.

The court and Ms. Dillard discuss the list of missing items sent to her by the Examiner. Ms. Dillard reports of working on clearing the list with assistance of a paralegal and had been advised that papers would be filed by today. Ms. Dillard advises that she has contacted the Executor of the Estate in Georgia. After additional discussion, the court confirms with Ms. Dillard that it is expecting her to file or submit the following items before next calling of this matter:

1) A Declaration that the only asset of the estate is the real property located on Revere Ave.

2) A completed DE-120 form with proof of notice to the Executor in Georgia.

3) A proposed order including the legal description of the real property within the body of the proposed order, not as an attachment.

The matter is continued to Jul-11-2022 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Ross Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Singh. Not reported.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Final Distribution
Off Calendar Apr-11-2022 Continued To May-11-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Final Distribution
Off Calendar Jan-05-2022 Continued To Apr-11-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Danielle Dillard appeared by zoom in propria persona.

The court noted that a verification was recently filed and asked where things stand with regard to getting the estate closed. Ms. Dillard stated that she was under the impression that after she turned everything in, the estate could be closed and that she was finished. The court informed Ms. Dillard that some of the open issues is giving notice to her prior lawyer who passed away as she might be entitled to compensation/her estate and her successors in interest might be entitled to compensation for the work she did. Ms. Dillard stated that Chaune was her personal friend since the age of five, that Chaune was just helping her and wasn't charging her, and that there wasn't any talk about billing. Ms. Dillard also stated that her mother basically raised Chaune and that she was just helping her with the paper work. The court explained that anytime a lawyer makes an appearance in a case and does work for an estate, they are entitled to some form of compensation at the time of close of the estate, raised the issue of Chaune's family members possibly seeing things the same way as she does, and stated that she needs to give them notice so that the court can find out if that's the case. Ms. Dillard stated that the only cash on hand was her mother's bank account with $3,000.00, that she took that out to pay the bank note and that there was nothing else. Ms. Dillard also stated that the furniture was given to her daughter and that the car was given to her mother's sister. The court noted that there was an inventory and appraisal that was from earlier in the case which listed personal effects and a mercedes, and asked Ms. Dillard to do a verified pleading explaining what she just said and where everything went. The court also informed Ms. Dillard that she needs to provide a proposed order. Ms. Dillard stated that Chaune has her parents, that she has no siblings and that she has one child who is about nine years old. The court informed Ms. Dillard that she should give notice to the child's father and to Chaune's parents in the event they feel she was entitled to any compensation/payment. The Petition for Final Distribution is continued to April 11, 2022 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Final Distribution
Off Calendar Dec-06-2021 Continued To Jan-05-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Final Distribution
Off Calendar Sep-27-2021 Continued To Dec-06-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Danielle Dillard, via ZOOM, in propria persona, Administrator.

Ms. Dillard begins by advising the court that the paralegal she is working with is ready to file papers but will not do so until they have been fully compensated. Ms. Dillard reports that she has just began working after not working for a year and is working with the paralegal on a payment plan. The court reminds Ms. Dillard that the court will consider taking the petition off calendar if nothing has been filed by the next calling of this matter and she will need to file a new petition which will require her to pay a new filing fee.

After additional discussion, the Petition for Final Distribution is continued to Dec-06-2021 at 9:00 am in Department 204.

Judge: Hon. Ross Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: E. Prado. Not reported.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Final Distribution
Off Calendar Jun-14-2021 Continued To Sep-27-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Danielle Dillard, via ZOOM, in propria persona, Administrator.

The court begins by advising Ms. Dillard that this estate should be closed by now and advises her to pay attention to the Examiner's notes. Ms. Dillard reports that she is currently working with a paralegal to complete papers to close the estate and requests a continuance accordingly. The court then confirms Ms. Dillard's email address which will be forwarded to the Examiner for ease of communication.

The Petition for Final Distribution is continued to September 27, 2021, at 9:00 am in Department 204.

Judge: Hon. Ross Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: K. Kabasares. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Aug-17-2020 Continued To Sep-28-20 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Danielle Dillard appeared by zoom in Propria Persona.

The Court noted that Ms. Dillard got her petition for final distribution on file, and questions where she stands with the inventory and appraisal. Ms. Dillard stated that she sent the paper over to Margie Luna at Mr. Kasolas' office last week and that she is waiting for them to finish the inventory and appraisal. Status on close of estate is continued to September 28, 2020 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for status of the inventory and appraisal.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Probate Examiner: Sandy Hilton. Deputy: K. Cabasares. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Jul-13-2020 Continued To Aug-17-20 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Danielle Dillard appeared by telephone in Propria Persona.

The Court noted that the file indicates that Ms. Dillard prepared an inventory and appraisal, that it has not been filed yet, and asks where things are and what's the delay. Ms. Dillard stated that she had the Paralegal bring the papers in last Thursday. The Court informed Ms. Dillard that is it not filed, and stated that if it is prepared, it needs to be filed, that she needs to pay the fees and reminded Ms. Dillard that it is important that this case go forward. Status on close of estate (filing of the inventory and appraisal and a petition for final distribution) is continued to August 17, 2020 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The orders to appear (2) are off calendar.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Court Examiner: Sandy Hilton. Deputy: K. Cabasares. Not reported.

Off Calendar Jan-22-2020 Continued To Feb-10-20 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Danielle Dillard in Propria Persona.

Ms. Dillard stated that she has the paper work from the Paralegal, that she came yesterday to file a waiver of accounting, and that the Clerk gave her a hard time and wouldn't accept it. The Court took a look at the paper and instructed Ms. Dillard to meet with Sandy Hilton (Probate Examiner) in Room 202. Status on close of estate is continued to February 10, 2020 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Dec-11-2019 Continued To Jan-22-20 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Oct-02-2019 Continued To Dec-11-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Danielle Pitcher Dillard in propria persona

The Court inquired if there is a Practice Administrator for deceased attorney Chaune Williams. Ms. Dillard stated nobody has contacted her, she is not aware of anyone taking over for her counsel, she has spoken to some attorney, attorney's fees are too much, other than her mother's property there are no other assets or relatives, she does not want to pull money out of the house her mother had paid into to pay an attorney, she doesn't qualify for free legal services, she is trying to pay the mortgage on her own house as well as the mortgage on her mother's house. The court provided Ms. Dillard a probate paralegal list.

The status on close of estate is continued to December 11, 2019 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept 204.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: S. Le. Deputy: C. Wu. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Jun-26-2019 Continued To Oct-02-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Danielle Dillard in Propria Persona.

Ms. Dillard stated that she does not know if a Practice Administrator has been assigned to Ms. Williams' cases, that her Attorney helped her so that she could get to the bank accounts to pay for the house, that she is the only one, that there is no one else and asked if she could drop the petition. The Court informed Ms. Dillard that the petition could not be dropped and that the process needs to be completed. Status on close of estate is continued to October 2, 2019 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for an appearance by new Counsel. The Court informed Ms. Dillard that if they are unable to close the estate, a petition for approval of report on status of administration has to be filed. The order to appear is off calendar.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Chan. Not reported.

An Order to Appear will be issued to the Administrator to appear on June 26, 2019 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why she failed to appear and why the inventory and appraisal, and a petition for final distribution, or a petition for approval of report on status of administration have not been filed. Status on close of estate is also continued to that date.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Chan. Not reported.
